name: V-Up
image_match: Jackknife Sit-Up — the jackknife is the same simultaneous leg-and-torso raise as a V-up. yuhonas has no entry literally named 'V-up'; probed Jackknife_Sit-Up (HTTP 200) and Sit-Up (200) — jackknife is the closer pattern match.
form_cues: Raise legs and torso together, reach hands toward toes
notes: Logged in Phase 1 PT core blocks as 'V-up / Toe-Touch Hybrid' (bodyweight).
video_id_query: V-up exercise how to proper form
instructions: Lie flat on your back with arms extended overhead and legs straight.
In one motion, lift your legs and upper body, folding at the hips, and reach your hands toward your toes.
Pause at the top in the V position.
Lower back down under control to the starting position.
